title: Aurora Cannabis Files Full Year 2025 Results and Fiscal Q4 2025 Announcement
text: Aurora Cannabis reported exceptional fiscal 2025 results on June 18, 2025. Full year performance: Record global medical cannabis net revenue of $244.4 million (39% YoY growth), Record adjusted EBITDA of $49.7 million (261% YoY growth), Positive free cash flow of $9.9 million, Strong balance sheet with ~$185.3 million cash and debt-free cannabis operations. Q4 2025 highlights: Total net revenue reached $90.5 million, up 34% year-over-year. Medical cannabis revenue grew 48% to $67.8 million. International markets more than doubled, representing 61% of global medical revenue. Adjusted EBITDA surged 619% to $16.7 million. Executive Chairman Miguel Martin stated: We are pleased to report an exceptional year to shareholders, highlighted by record annual global medical net revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and positive free cash flow. Forward guidance for Q1 2026: Management expects slightly lower global cannabis revenue than Q4 2025, with improvement in later quarters. Plant propagation revenue expected to benefit from peak seasonal quarter. Strong margins with continued positive adjusted EBITDA. Positive free cash flow projection. Conference call hosted on June 18, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
